chef.note: Accepted CHEF storage may be reused only after it is validated against the same isolated-test restaurant record; otherwise Task 7 must reprovision it from a fresh manager invite.

cashier.note: Task 7 must provision a fresh CASHIER invitation and active-role session on isolated-test. No persisted cashier storage shortcut is published in Task 6.

evidenceMatrix.RD-1: Realtime completion refresh and READY auto-removal proof path
evidenceMatrix.RD-2: Compose-backed remediation lane, readiness gate, and replacement certification authority
evidenceMatrix.RD-3: Kitchen queue, preparing, and ready behavior against the trimmed frontend contract surface
evidenceMatrix.RD-4: SELF_SERVICE completion empty-state copy on the completion panel
evidenceMatrix.RD-5: Architect-approved mute semantics across sound and flash
evidenceMatrix.RD-6: Dedicated waiter-mode and self-service completion paths, including SELF_SERVICE paid outcomes
